metadata.description: English report templates for CSRD sustainability reporting

executive_summary.title: Executive Summary
executive_summary.overview: This sustainability statement has been prepared in accordance with the European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS) as adopted by the European Commission under the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD).
executive_summary.scope_description: Scope and Boundary of This Report

general_information.title: General Information
general_information.subtitle: ESRS 2 General Disclosures
general_information.description: This section provides general information about the undertaking's governance, strategy, and approach to managing impacts, risks and opportunities related to sustainability matters.

governance.title: Governance
governance.description: Description of the governance processes, controls and procedures used to monitor, manage and oversee sustainability matters.
governance.gov_1: Role of Administrative, Management and Supervisory Bodies
governance.gov_2: Information Provided to and Sustainability Matters Addressed by Governing Bodies
governance.gov_3: Integration of Sustainability-Related Performance in Incentive Schemes
governance.gov_5: Risk Management and Internal Controls over Sustainability Reporting

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: How the undertaking's strategy and business model interact with its material sustainability matters.
strategy.sbm_1: Market Position, Strategy, Business Model and Value Chain
strategy.sbm_3: Material Impacts, Risks and Opportunities and Their Interaction with Strategy and Business Model

impact_risk_opportunity.title: Impact, Risk and Opportunity Management
impact_risk_opportunity.description: How the undertaking identifies, assesses and manages sustainability-related impacts, risks and opportunities.
impact_risk_opportunity.iro_1: Description of Processes to Identify and Assess Material Impacts, Risks and Opportunities
impact_risk_opportunity.iro_2: Disclosure Requirements in ESRS Covered by the Sustainability Statement

metrics_targets.title: Metrics and Targets
metrics_targets.description: Metrics used by the undertaking to measure performance on material sustainability matters and progress towards targets.

basis_preparation.title: Basis for Preparation
basis_preparation.bp_1: General Basis for Preparation of Sustainability Statement
basis_preparation.bp_2: Disclosures in Relation to Specific Circumstances

environmental.title: Environmental Information
environmental.subtitle: ESRS E1-E5 Environmental Standards
environmental.description: This section covers the undertaking's material environmental impacts, risks and opportunities across climate change, pollution, water, biodiversity and circular economy.

E1.title: Climate Change (ESRS E1)
E1.description: Disclosures related to climate change mitigation and adaptation, including GHG emissions, energy consumption, and transition planning.
E1.transition_plan: Transition Plan for Climate Change Mitigation
E1.policies: Policies Related to Climate Change Mitigation and Adaptation
E1.actions: Actions and Resources in Relation to Climate Change Policies
E1.targets: Targets Related to Climate Change Mitigation and Adaptation
E1.ghg_emissions: Gross Scopes 1, 2, 3 and Total GHG Emissions
E1.ghg_removals: GHG Removals and GHG Mitigation Projects
E1.financial_effects: Anticipated Financial Effects from Material Physical and Transition Risks

E2.title: Pollution (ESRS E2)
E2.description: Disclosures related to pollution of air, water and soil, including substances of concern.
E2.actions: Actions and Resources Related to Pollution
E2.pollution_metrics: Pollution of Air, Water and Soil
E2.substances_concern: Substances of Concern and Substances of Very High Concern
E2.financial_effects: Anticipated Financial Effects from Pollution-Related Impacts

E3.title: Water and Marine Resources (ESRS E3)
E3.description: Disclosures related to water consumption, withdrawal, discharge and impacts on marine resources.
E3.policies: Policies Related to Water and Marine Resources
E3.actions: Actions and Resources Related to Water and Marine Resources
E3.targets: Targets Related to Water and Marine Resources
E3.financial_effects: Anticipated Financial Effects from Water-Related Impacts

E4.title: Biodiversity and Ecosystems (ESRS E4)
E4.description: Disclosures related to biodiversity, ecosystems, and land-use change.
E4.transition_plan: Transition Plan on Biodiversity and Ecosystems
E4.policies: Policies Related to Biodiversity and Ecosystems
E4.actions: Actions and Resources Related to Biodiversity and Ecosystems
E4.targets: Targets Related to Biodiversity and Ecosystems
E4.impact_metrics: Impact Metrics Related to Biodiversity and Ecosystems
E4.financial_effects: Anticipated Financial Effects from Biodiversity-Related Impacts

E5.title: Resource Use and Circular Economy (ESRS E5)
E5.description: Disclosures related to resource inflows, outflows, waste, and circular economy strategies.
E5.policies: Policies Related to Resource Use and Circular Economy
E5.actions: Actions and Resources Related to Resource Use and Circular Economy
E5.targets: Targets Related to Resource Use and Circular Economy
E5.financial_effects: Anticipated Financial Effects from Resource Use-Related Impacts

social.title: Social Information
social.subtitle: ESRS S1-S4 Social Standards
social.description: This section covers the undertaking's material social impacts, risks and opportunities related to own workforce, value chain workers, affected communities, and consumers/end-users.

S1.title: Own Workforce (ESRS S1)
S1.description: Disclosures related to working conditions, equal treatment, and other work-related rights for the undertaking's own employees and non-employee workers.
S1.engagement: Processes for Engaging with Own Workforce
S1.remediation: Processes to Remediate Negative Impacts and Grievance Channels
S1.actions: Actions on Material Impacts and Managing Risks and Opportunities
S1.collective_bargaining: Collective Bargaining Coverage and Social Dialogue
S1.remuneration: Remuneration Metrics (Pay Gap and Total Remuneration)
S1.incidents: Incidents, Complaints and Severe Human Rights Impacts

S2.title: Workers in the Value Chain (ESRS S2)
S2.description: Disclosures related to working conditions and rights of workers in the upstream and downstream value chain.
S2.policies: Policies Related to Value Chain Workers
S2.engagement: Processes for Engaging with Value Chain Workers
S2.remediation: Processes to Remediate Negative Impacts and Grievance Channels
S2.actions: Actions on Material Impacts on Value Chain Workers
S2.targets: Targets Related to Value Chain Workers

S3.title: Affected Communities (ESRS S3)
S3.description: Disclosures related to impacts on communities in areas where the undertaking operates.
S3.engagement: Processes for Engaging with Affected Communities
S3.remediation: Processes to Remediate Negative Impacts and Grievance Channels
S3.actions: Actions on Material Impacts on Affected Communities

S4.title: Consumers and End-Users (ESRS S4)
S4.description: Disclosures related to product safety, data privacy, and other consumer rights.
S4.policies: Policies Related to Consumers and End-Users
S4.engagement: Processes for Engaging with Consumers and End-Users
S4.remediation: Processes to Remediate Negative Impacts and Grievance Channels
S4.actions: Actions on Material Impacts on Consumers and End-Users
S4.targets: Targets Related to Consumers and End-Users

governance.title: Governance Information
governance.subtitle: ESRS G1 Governance Standard
governance.description: This section covers the undertaking's governance of business conduct, including anti-corruption, political engagement, and supply chain management.

G1.title: Business Conduct (ESRS G1)
G1.description: Disclosures on corporate culture, anti-corruption and bribery, political influence, and payment practices.
G1.policies: Business Conduct Policies and Corporate Culture
G1.corruption: Prevention and Detection of Corruption and Bribery
G1.incidents: Confirmed Incidents of Corruption or Bribery

methodology.title: Appendix A: Methodology
methodology.description: Detailed description of methodologies used for data collection, calculation, and estimation.

data_quality.title: Appendix B: Data Quality Assessment
data_quality.description: Assessment of data quality across reported metrics including coverage, accuracy, and limitations.

gri_mapping.title: Appendix C: GRI Content Index
gri_mapping.description: Cross-reference mapping of ESRS disclosures to GRI Standards.

un_sdg_mapping.title: Appendix D: UN SDG Mapping
un_sdg_mapping.description: Mapping of sustainability activities to United Nations Sustainable Development Goals.

glossary.title: Appendix E: Glossary of Terms
glossary.description: Definitions of key terms and abbreviations used in this report.

assurance_report.title: Appendix F: Independent Assurance Report
assurance_report.description: Independent third-party assurance opinion on selected sustainability information.

eu_taxonomy.title: Appendix G: EU Taxonomy Alignment
eu_taxonomy.description: Disclosure of the undertaking's EU Taxonomy-eligible and Taxonomy-aligned economic activities.

boilerplate.methodology_note: The data presented in this report has been prepared in accordance with the European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS) as adopted under Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2023/2772. Quantitative metrics have been calculated using established methodologies including the GHG Protocol, IPCC guidelines, and relevant ISO standards. Where estimation has been used, the methodology and assumptions are disclosed alongside the relevant data points.
boilerplate.assurance_statement: This sustainability statement has been subject to {assurance_level} assurance by {assurer_name} in accordance with ISAE 3000 (Revised). The assurance report is presented in Appendix F.
boilerplate.forward_looking_disclaimer: This report contains forward-looking statements regarding the undertaking's sustainability strategy, targets, and anticipated outcomes. These statements are based on current expectations and assumptions and involve risks and uncertainties. Actual results may differ materially from those expressed or implied. The undertaking undertakes no obligation to update these statements.
boilerplate.basis_of_preparation: This sustainability statement covers the reporting period from {start_date} to {end_date}. The consolidation scope is consistent with the financial statements unless otherwise stated. The reporting boundary includes all entities under the operational control of {company_name}.
boilerplate.materiality_note: The content of this sustainability statement has been determined through a double materiality assessment conducted in accordance with ESRS 1 Chapter 3. Both impact materiality and financial materiality perspectives have been considered. Topics determined to be material are covered in detail; topics determined to be not material are briefly addressed with an explanation of the materiality assessment outcome.
boilerplate.data_quality_note: The data quality of the information reported has been assessed using a five-point scale from Very High to Very Low. The data quality assessment considers the specificity, completeness, reliability, timeliness, and accuracy of the data sources. Any significant limitations or estimation uncertainties are disclosed alongside the relevant data points.
boilerplate.comparative_note: Where applicable, comparative data for the prior reporting period is provided alongside current period figures. Restatements of prior period data, if any, are identified and explained.
boilerplate.value_chain_note: Information on the value chain has been included where the undertaking has assessed that upstream or downstream activities are associated with material sustainability impacts, risks or opportunities. The approach to estimating value chain data is described in the methodology appendix.
